title: Track generated ledger Markdown and keep indexes disposable
context: Freshness validation and sync need a stable distinction between canonical ledger records, disposable indexes, generated Markdown, and hand-authored context.
decision: Track generated STATUS, active-work, blocked, and optional task-view Markdown. Generate reports and context by default, task views only with --views, and validate freshness using the same selection. Keep canonical JSON and hand-authored summary.md outside output freshness checks; keep SQLite, Graphify, executables, logs, and bundles ignored and disposable.
consequences: Fresh clones retain an inspectable status snapshot and task views.
Generated Markdown must be deterministic and regenerated alongside related canonical changes.
The sync implementation must preserve the default-versus---views output boundary and keep validation read-only.
